# Astro Blog — Implementation Plan

> **For Claude:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task.

**Goal:** Scaffold a bilingual (EN/VI) developer blog on Astro 5 + GitHub Pages with dark mode, Giscus comments, and zero hosting cost.

**Architecture:** Static site generated by Astro 5 from markdown content collections, deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions. Posts organized by locale (`en/`, `vi/`), styled with Tailwind CSS 4, dark/light mode via class toggle, comments via Giscus (GitHub Discussions backend).

**Tech Stack:** Astro 5, Tailwind CSS 4, MDX, Giscus, GitHub Pages, GitHub Actions

---

### Task 1: Initialize Project

**Files:**
- Create: `package.json`
- Create: `astro.config.mjs`
- Create: `tsconfig.json`
- Create: `.gitignore`

**Step 1: Init git repo**

```bash
cd /Users/BuiAnhTai/GitHub/Blogs
git init
```

**Step 2: Create Astro project**

```bash
cd /Users/BuiAnhTai/GitHub/Blogs
npm create astro@latest . -- --template minimal --no-install --typescript strict
```

If prompted about overwriting, accept. Select `Empty` template if asked.

**Step 3: Install dependencies**

```bash
cd /Users/BuiAnhTai/GitHub/Blogs
npm install
npx astro add mdx tailwind sitemap --yes
```

**Step 4: Verify it runs**

```bash
cd /Users/BuiAnhTai/GitHub/Blogs
npx astro dev --port 4321
```

Expected: Server starts at `http://localhost:4321` with no errors.

**Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "feat: init astro 5 project with mdx, tailwind, sitemap"
```

---

### Task 2: Configure Astro — i18n, Markdown, Site

**Files:**
- Modify: `astro.config.mjs`

**Step 1: Write the full Astro config**

Replace `astro.config.mjs` with:

```javascript
import { defineConfig } from 'astro/config';
import mdx from '@astrojs/mdx';
import sitemap from '@astrojs/sitemap';
import tailwindcss from '@tailwindcss/vite';

export default defineConfig({
  site: 'https://buianhtai.github.io',

  integrations: [
    mdx(),
    sitemap({
      i18n: {
        defaultLocale: 'en',
        locales: {
          en: 'en-US',
          vi: 'vi-VN',
        },
      },
    }),
  ],

  vite: {
    plugins: [tailwindcss()],
  },

  i18n: {
    defaultLocale: 'en',
    locales: ['en', 'vi'],
    routing: {
      prefixDefaultLocale: true,
    },
  },

  markdown: {
    shikiConfig: {
      themes: {
        light: 'github-light',
        dark: 'github-dark',
      },
    },
  },
});
```

**Step 2: Verify config loads**

```bash
npx astro check
```

Expected: No config errors.

**Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add astro.config.mjs
git commit -m "feat: configure i18n, shiki dual themes, sitemap"
```

---

### Task 3: Define Content Collections

**Files:**
- Create: `src/content.config.ts`
- Create: `src/content/blog/en/hello-world.mdx`
- Create: `src/content/blog/vi/xin-chao.mdx`

**Step 1: Create content collection schema**

```typescript
// src/content.config.ts
import { defineCollection, z } from 'astro:content';
import { glob } from 'astro/loaders';

const blog = defineCollection({
  loader: glob({ pattern: '**/*.{md,mdx}', base: './src/content/blog' }),
  schema: z.object({
    title: z.string(),
    description: z.string(),
    pubDate: z.coerce.date(),
    updatedDate: z.coerce.date().optional(),
    heroImage: z.string().optional(),
    tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
    lang: z.enum(['en', 'vi']),
    draft: z.boolean().default(false),
  }),
});

export const collections = { blog };
```

**Step 2: Create first English post**

```mdx
---
title: "Hello World"
description: "My first blog post — documenting what I learn as a full-stack developer."
pubDate: 2026-03-22
tags: ["intro", "meta"]
lang: "en"
---

# Hello World

Welcome to my blog. I'm Tai — a backend engineer working with Spring Boot, Kubernetes, and AI agent platforms.

This blog is where I document what I learn across the full stack. Expect posts about:

- **Java/Spring ecosystem** — Boot, Reactor, WebFlux, Cloud Stream
- **AI/LLM engineering** — agent platforms, prompt engineering, tool integration
- **DevOps** — Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, AWS
- **Frontend experiments** — TypeScript, Flutter, UI patterns

Let's go.
```

**Step 3: Create first Vietnamese post**

```mdx
---
title: "Xin Chào"
description: "Bài viết đầu tiên — ghi lại những gì tôi học được trong hành trình full-stack developer."
pubDate: 2026-03-22
tags: ["intro", "meta"]
lang: "vi"
---

# Xin Chào

Chào mừng đến với blog của tôi. Tôi là Tài — một backend engineer làm việc với Spring Boot, Kubernetes, và AI agent platforms.

Blog này là nơi tôi ghi lại những gì tôi học được. Các chủ đề:

- **Java/Spring** — Boot, Reactor, WebFlux, Cloud Stream
- **AI/LLM** — agent platforms, prompt engineering, tool integration
- **DevOps** — Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, AWS
- **Frontend** — TypeScript, Flutter, UI patterns

Bắt đầu thôi.
```

**Step 4: Verify content collections load**

```bash
npx astro check
```

Expected: No errors about content collections.

**Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add src/content.config.ts src/content/
git commit -m "feat: add blog content collection with en/vi seed posts"
```

### Task 4: Create Base Layout with Dark Mode

**Files:**
- Create: `src/styles/global.css`
- Create: `src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro`
- Create: `src/components/ThemeToggle.astro`
- Create: `src/components/Header.astro`
- Create: `src/components/Footer.astro`

**Step 1: Create global CSS with Tailwind import**

```css
/* src/styles/global.css */
@import "tailwindcss";

@theme {
  --color-bg: #0f172a;
  --color-surface: #1e293b;
  --color-border: #334155;
  --color-text: #e2e8f0;
  --color-text-dim: #94a3b8;
  --color-accent: #38bdf8;
  --color-accent-dim: #0ea5e9;
}

html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

html.light {
  --color-bg: #f8fafc;
  --color-surface: #ffffff;
  --color-border: #e2e8f0;
  --color-text: #1e293b;
  --color-text-dim: #64748b;
  --color-accent: #0284c7;
  --color-accent-dim: #0369a1;
}

body {
  background-color: var(--color-bg);
  color: var(--color-text);
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
  transition: background-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  .astro-code,
  .astro-code span {
    color: var(--shiki-dark) !important;
    background-color: var(--shiki-dark-bg) !important;
  }
}

html.light .astro-code,
html.light .astro-code span {
  color: var(--shiki-light) !important;
  background-color: var(--shiki-light-bg) !important;
}
```

**Step 2: Create ThemeToggle component**

```astro
---
// src/components/ThemeToggle.astro
---

<button
  id="theme-toggle"
  class="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-[var(--color-surface)] transition-colors"
  aria-label="Toggle theme"
>
  <svg id="icon-moon" class="w-5 h-5 hidden" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21.752 15.002A9.718 9.718 0 0118 15.75c-5.385 0-9.75-4.365-9.75-9.75 0-1.33.266-2.597.748-3.752A9.753 9.753 0 003 11.25C3 16.635 7.365 21 12.75 21a9.753 9.753 0 006.002-2.082z" />
  </svg>
  <svg id="icon-sun" class="w-5 h-5 hidden" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 3v2.25m6.364.386l-1.591 1.591M21 12h-2.25m-.386 6.364l-1.591-1.591M12 18.75V21m-4.773-4.227l-1.591 1.591M5.25 12H3m4.227-4.773L5.636 5.636M15.75 12a3.75 3.75 0 11-7.5 0 3.75 3.75 0 017.5 0z" />
  </svg>
</button>

<script is:inline>
  function setTheme(theme) {
    document.documentElement.classList.toggle('light', theme === 'light');
    localStorage.setItem('theme', theme);
    document.getElementById('icon-moon').classList.toggle('hidden', theme !== 'dark');
    document.getElementById('icon-sun').classList.toggle('hidden', theme !== 'light');
    document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('theme-change'));
  }

  const saved = localStorage.getItem('theme');
  const prefersDark = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches;
  setTheme(saved || (prefersDark ? 'dark' : 'light'));

  document.getElementById('theme-toggle').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const current = document.documentElement.classList.contains('light') ? 'light' : 'dark';
    setTheme(current === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark');
  });
</script>
```

**Step 3: Create Header component**

```astro
---
// src/components/Header.astro
const { lang = 'en' } = Astro.props;
const otherLang = lang === 'en' ? 'vi' : 'en';
const langLabel = lang === 'en' ? '🇻🇳 VI' : '🇬🇧 EN';
const currentPath = Astro.url.pathname;
const switchedPath = currentPath.replace(`/${lang}/`, `/${otherLang}/`);
---

<header class="border-b border-[var(--color-border)] sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-[var(--color-bg)]/80">
  <nav class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 h-16 flex items-center justify-between">
    <a href={`/${lang}/`} class="text-lg font-bold font-mono text-[var(--color-accent)]">
      tai.bui
    </a>

    <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
      <a href={`/${lang}/blog`} class="text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] hover:text-[var(--color-text)] transition-colors">
        Blog
      </a>
      <a href={`/${lang}/tags`} class="text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] hover:text-[var(--color-text)] transition-colors">
        Tags
      </a>
      <a href={switchedPath} class="text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] hover:text-[var(--color-text)] transition-colors">
        {langLabel}
      </a>

      <ThemeToggle />
    </div>
  </nav>
</header>

<script>
  import ThemeToggle from './ThemeToggle.astro';
</script>
```

Note: The ThemeToggle import in the Header won't work via `<script>` — it needs to be imported as a component in the frontmatter. Correct version:

```astro
---
// src/components/Header.astro
import ThemeToggle from './ThemeToggle.astro';
const { lang = 'en' } = Astro.props;
const otherLang = lang === 'en' ? 'vi' : 'en';
const langLabel = lang === 'en' ? '🇻🇳 VI' : '🇬🇧 EN';
const currentPath = Astro.url.pathname;
const switchedPath = currentPath.replace(`/${lang}/`, `/${otherLang}/`);
---

<header class="border-b border-[var(--color-border)] sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-[var(--color-bg)]/80">
  <nav class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 h-16 flex items-center justify-between">
    <a href={`/${lang}/`} class="text-lg font-bold font-mono text-[var(--color-accent)]">
      tai.bui
    </a>
    <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
      <a href={`/${lang}/blog`} class="text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] hover:text-[var(--color-text)] transition-colors">Blog</a>
      <a href={`/${lang}/tags`} class="text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] hover:text-[var(--color-text)] transition-colors">Tags</a>
      <a href={switchedPath} class="text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] hover:text-[var(--color-text)] transition-colors">{langLabel}</a>
      <ThemeToggle />
    </div>
  </nav>
</header>
```

**Step 5: Create BaseLayout**

```astro
---
// src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro
import Header from '../components/Header.astro';
import Footer from '../components/Footer.astro';
import '../styles/global.css';

interface Props {
  title: string;
  description?: string;
  lang?: string;
  ogImage?: string;
}

const {
  title,
  description = 'Learn in public — a full-stack developer blog by Tai Bui',
  lang = 'en',
  ogImage,
} = Astro.props;

const canonicalURL = new URL(Astro.url.pathname, Astro.site);
---

<!doctype html>
<html lang={lang} class="dark">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <meta name="generator" content={Astro.generator} />

    <title>{title} | tai.bui</title>
    <meta name="description" content={description} />
    <link rel="canonical" href={canonicalURL} />

    <meta property="og:title" content={title} />
    <meta property="og:description" content={description} />
    <meta property="og:type" content="article" />
    <meta property="og:url" content={canonicalURL} />
    {ogImage && <meta property="og:image" content={ogImage} />}

    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
    <meta name="twitter:title" content={title} />
    <meta name="twitter:description" content={description} />
    <meta name="twitter:site" content="@buianhtai90" />

    <link rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml" title="tai.bui blog" href="/rss.xml" />
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  </head>
  <body class="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
    <Header lang={lang} />
    <main class="flex-1">
      <slot />
    </main>
    <Footer />
  </body>
</html>
```

**Step 6: Verify the layout renders**

```bash
npx astro dev --port 4321
```

Visit `http://localhost:4321` — should see header, footer, dark background. Theme toggle should switch.

**Step 7: Commit**

```bash
git add src/styles/ src/layouts/ src/components/
git commit -m "feat: add base layout with dark mode, header, footer"
```

### Task 5: Create Blog Post Layout

**Files:**
- Create: `src/layouts/BlogPost.astro`
- Create: `src/components/Giscus.astro`
- Create: `src/components/ReadingTime.astro`
- Create: `src/components/TableOfContents.astro`

**Step 1: Create ReadingTime component**

```astro
---
// src/components/ReadingTime.astro
interface Props { content: string; lang?: string; }
const { content, lang = 'en' } = Astro.props;
const words = content.split(/\s+/).length;
const minutes = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(words / 200));
const label = lang === 'vi' ? `${minutes} phút đọc` : `${minutes} min read`;
---
<span class="text-[var(--color-text-dim)]">{label}</span>
```

**Step 2: Create TableOfContents component**

```astro
---
// src/components/TableOfContents.astro
interface Props { headings: { depth: number; slug: string; text: string }[]; }
const { headings } = Astro.props;
const filtered = headings.filter(h => h.depth >= 2 && h.depth <= 3);
---
{filtered.length > 0 && (
  <nav class="mb-12 p-4 rounded-lg bg-[var(--color-surface)] border border-[var(--color-border)]">
    <h2 class="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-[var(--color-text-dim)] mb-3">Contents</h2>
    <ul class="space-y-1">
      {filtered.map(h => (
        <li style={`padding-left: ${(h.depth - 2) * 1}rem`}>
          <a href={`#${h.slug}`} class="text-sm text-[var(--color-accent)] hover:underline">{h.text}</a>
        </li>
      ))}
    </ul>
  </nav>
)}
```

**Step 3: Create Giscus component**

```astro
---
// src/components/Giscus.astro
---
<section class="mt-16 pt-8 border-t border-[var(--color-border)]" id="comments">
  <h2 class="text-xl font-bold mb-6">Comments</h2>
  <div id="giscus-container"></div>
</section>

<script is:inline>
  function loadGiscus() {
    const container = document.getElementById('giscus-container');
    if (!container || container.querySelector('script')) return;

    const script = document.createElement('script');
    script.src = 'https://giscus.app/client.js';
    script.setAttribute('data-repo', 'buianhtai/buianhtai.github.io');
    script.setAttribute('data-repo-id', ''); // Fill after creating repo
    script.setAttribute('data-category', 'Blog Comments');
    script.setAttribute('data-category-id', ''); // Fill after enabling Discussions
    script.setAttribute('data-mapping', 'pathname');
    script.setAttribute('data-strict', '0');
    script.setAttribute('data-reactions-enabled', '1');
    script.setAttribute('data-emit-metadata', '0');
    script.setAttribute('data-input-position', 'bottom');
    script.setAttribute('data-theme', document.documentElement.classList.contains('light') ? 'light' : 'dark');
    script.setAttribute('data-lang', document.documentElement.lang || 'en');
    script.setAttribute('crossorigin', 'anonymous');
    script.async = true;
    container.appendChild(script);
  }

  loadGiscus();

  document.addEventListener('theme-change', () => {
    const iframe = document.querySelector('iframe.giscus-frame');
    if (iframe) {
      const theme = document.documentElement.classList.contains('light') ? 'light' : 'dark';
      iframe.contentWindow.postMessage({ giscus: { setConfig: { theme } } }, 'https://giscus.app');
    }
  });
</script>
```

**Step 4: Create BlogPost layout**

```astro
---
// src/layouts/BlogPost.astro
import type { CollectionEntry } from 'astro:content';
import BaseLayout from './BaseLayout.astro';
import ReadingTime from '../components/ReadingTime.astro';
import TableOfContents from '../components/TableOfContents.astro';
import Giscus from '../components/Giscus.astro';

interface Props {
  post: CollectionEntry<'blog'>;
  headings: { depth: number; slug: string; text: string }[];
  rawContent: string;
}

const { post, headings, rawContent } = Astro.props;
const { title, description, pubDate, updatedDate, tags, lang, heroImage } = post.data;

const dateFmt = (d: Date) =>
  d.toLocaleDateString(lang === 'vi' ? 'vi-VN' : 'en-US', {
    year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric',
  });
---

<BaseLayout title={title} description={description} lang={lang} ogImage={heroImage}>
  <article class="max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-12">
    <header class="mb-10">
      <div class="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] mb-4">
        <time datetime={pubDate.toISOString()}>{dateFmt(pubDate)}</time>
        {updatedDate && <span>· Updated {dateFmt(updatedDate)}</span>}
        <span>·</span>
        <ReadingTime content={rawContent} lang={lang} />
      </div>

      <h1 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-4">{title}</h1>
      <p class="text-lg text-[var(--color-text-dim)]">{description}</p>

      {tags.length > 0 && (
        <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-4">
          {tags.map(tag => (
            <a href={`/${lang}/tags/${tag}`}
               class="text-xs font-mono px-2 py-1 rounded bg-[var(--color-surface)] border border-[var(--color-border)] text-[var(--color-text-dim)] hover:text-[var(--color-accent)] transition-colors">
              #{tag}
            </a>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </header>

    {heroImage && (
      <img src={heroImage} alt={title} class="w-full rounded-lg mb-10" loading="eager" />
    )}

    <TableOfContents headings={headings} />

    <div class="prose prose-invert prose-lg max-w-none
      prose-headings:font-bold
      prose-a:text-[var(--color-accent)] prose-a:no-underline hover:prose-a:underline
      prose-code:bg-[var(--color-surface)] prose-code:px-1.5 prose-code:py-0.5 prose-code:rounded prose-code:text-sm
      prose-pre:bg-[#1a1b26] prose-pre:rounded-lg">
      <slot />
    </div>

    <footer class="mt-12 pt-6 border-t border-[var(--color-border)] flex items-center justify-between">
      <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
        {tags.map(tag => (
          <a href={`/${lang}/tags/${tag}`}
             class="text-xs font-mono px-2 py-1 rounded bg-[var(--color-surface)] border border-[var(--color-border)] text-[var(--color-text-dim)] hover:text-[var(--color-accent)]">
            #{tag}
          </a>
        ))}
      </div>
      <a href={`/${lang}/blog`} class="text-sm text-[var(--color-accent)] hover:underline">
        {lang === 'vi' ? '← Về blog' : '← Back to blog'}
      </a>
    </footer>

    <Giscus />
  </article>
</BaseLayout>
```

**Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add src/layouts/BlogPost.astro src/components/
git commit -m "feat: add blog post layout with reading time, TOC, giscus"
```

### Task 6: Create Route Pages

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/index.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/[lang]/index.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/[lang]/blog/index.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/[lang]/blog/[...slug].astro`
- Create: `src/pages/[lang]/tags/index.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/[lang]/tags/[tag].astro`

**Step 1: Create root redirect**

```astro
---
// src/pages/index.astro
return Astro.redirect('/en/');
---
```

**Step 2: Create lang home page**

```astro
---
// src/pages/[lang]/index.astro
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';

export function getStaticPaths() {
  return [{ params: { lang: 'en' } }, { params: { lang: 'vi' } }];
}

const { lang } = Astro.params;
const posts = (await getCollection('blog', (p) => p.data.lang === lang && !p.data.draft))
  .sort((a, b) => b.data.pubDate.valueOf() - a.data.pubDate.valueOf())
  .slice(0, 5);
---

<BaseLayout title={lang === 'vi' ? 'Trang chủ' : 'Home'} lang={lang}>
  <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-16">
    <section class="mb-16">
      <h1 class="text-4xl font-bold mb-4">
        {lang === 'vi' ? 'Xin chào, tôi là Tài' : "Hey, I'm Tai"} <span class="inline-block animate-[wave_1.5s_ease-in-out_infinite]">👋</span>
      </h1>
      <p class="text-lg text-[var(--color-text-dim)] leading-relaxed">
        {lang === 'vi'
          ? 'Backend engineer. Ghi lại những gì tôi học — Java, AI, DevOps, và hơn thế nữa.'
          : 'Backend engineer. Documenting what I learn — Java, AI, DevOps, and beyond.'}
      </p>
    </section>

    <section>
      <h2 class="text-xl font-bold mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
        <span class="font-mono text-[var(--color-accent)]">#</span>
        {lang === 'vi' ? 'Bài viết gần đây' : 'Recent Posts'}
      </h2>
      <ul class="space-y-4">
        {posts.map(post => {
          const [, ...slugParts] = post.id.split('/');
          const slug = slugParts.join('/').replace(/\.(md|mdx)$/, '');
          return (
            <li>
              <a href={`/${lang}/blog/${slug}`} class="group block p-4 -mx-4 rounded-lg hover:bg-[var(--color-surface)] transition-colors">
                <h3 class="font-semibold group-hover:text-[var(--color-accent)] transition-colors">{post.data.title}</h3>
                <p class="text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] mt-1">{post.data.description}</p>
                <time class="text-xs text-[var(--color-text-dim)] mt-2 block font-mono">
                  {post.data.pubDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10)}
                </time>
              </a>
            </li>
          );
        })}
      </ul>
      <a href={`/${lang}/blog`} class="inline-block mt-6 text-sm text-[var(--color-accent)] hover:underline">
        {lang === 'vi' ? 'Xem tất cả →' : 'View all →'}
      </a>
    </section>
  </div>
</BaseLayout>
```

**Step 3: Create blog listing page**

```astro
---
// src/pages/[lang]/blog/index.astro
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';

export function getStaticPaths() {
  return [{ params: { lang: 'en' } }, { params: { lang: 'vi' } }];
}

const { lang } = Astro.params;
const posts = (await getCollection('blog', (p) => p.data.lang === lang && !p.data.draft))
  .sort((a, b) => b.data.pubDate.valueOf() - a.data.pubDate.valueOf());
---

<BaseLayout title={lang === 'vi' ? 'Tất cả bài viết' : 'All Posts'} lang={lang}>
  <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-12">
    <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-8">{lang === 'vi' ? 'Tất cả bài viết' : 'All Posts'}</h1>
    <ul class="space-y-4">
      {posts.map(post => {
        const [, ...slugParts] = post.id.split('/');
        const slug = slugParts.join('/').replace(/\.(md|mdx)$/, '');
        return (
          <li>
            <a href={`/${lang}/blog/${slug}`} class="group block p-4 -mx-4 rounded-lg hover:bg-[var(--color-surface)] transition-colors">
              <div class="flex items-baseline justify-between gap-4">
                <h2 class="font-semibold group-hover:text-[var(--color-accent)] transition-colors">{post.data.title}</h2>
                <time class="text-xs text-[var(--color-text-dim)] font-mono shrink-0">{post.data.pubDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10)}</time>
              </div>
              <p class="text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] mt-1">{post.data.description}</p>
              <div class="flex gap-2 mt-2">
                {post.data.tags.map(tag => (
                  <span class="text-xs font-mono text-[var(--color-text-dim)]">#{tag}</span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </a>
          </li>
        );
      })}
    </ul>
  </div>
</BaseLayout>
```

**Step 4: Create dynamic blog post page**

```astro
---
// src/pages/[lang]/blog/[...slug].astro
import { getCollection, render } from 'astro:content';
import BlogPost from '../../../layouts/BlogPost.astro';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
  const posts = await getCollection('blog');
  return posts.map(post => {
    const [lang, ...slugParts] = post.id.split('/');
    return {
      params: { lang, slug: slugParts.join('/').replace(/\.(md|mdx)$/, '') },
      props: { post },
    };
  });
}

const { post } = Astro.props;
const { Content, headings } = await render(post);
const rawContent = post.body || '';
---

<BlogPost post={post} headings={headings} rawContent={rawContent}>
  <Content />
</BlogPost>
```

**Step 5: Create tags index page**

```astro
---
// src/pages/[lang]/tags/index.astro
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';

export function getStaticPaths() {
  return [{ params: { lang: 'en' } }, { params: { lang: 'vi' } }];
}

const { lang } = Astro.params;
const posts = await getCollection('blog', (p) => p.data.lang === lang && !p.data.draft);
const tagCounts = new Map<string, number>();
posts.forEach(p => p.data.tags.forEach(t => tagCounts.set(t, (tagCounts.get(t) || 0) + 1)));
const tags = [...tagCounts.entries()].sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
---

<BaseLayout title="Tags" lang={lang}>
  <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-12">
    <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-8">Tags</h1>
    <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
      {tags.map(([tag, count]) => (
        <a href={`/${lang}/tags/${tag}`}
           class="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[var(--color-surface)] border border-[var(--color-border)] text-sm font-mono hover:border-[var(--color-accent)] hover:text-[var(--color-accent)] transition-colors">
          #{tag} <span class="text-[var(--color-text-dim)]">({count})</span>
        </a>
      ))}
    </div>
  </div>
</BaseLayout>
```

**Step 6: Create tag detail page**

```astro
---
// src/pages/[lang]/tags/[tag].astro
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
  const posts = await getCollection('blog', (p) => !p.data.draft);
  const tagMap = new Map<string, string[]>();

  posts.forEach(post => {
    post.data.tags.forEach(tag => {
      if (!tagMap.has(`${post.data.lang}:${tag}`)) tagMap.set(`${post.data.lang}:${tag}`, []);
    });
  });

  const paths: any[] = [];
  const langs = ['en', 'vi'];
  const allTags = new Set<string>();
  posts.forEach(p => p.data.tags.forEach(t => allTags.add(t)));

  for (const lang of langs) {
    for (const tag of allTags) {
      paths.push({ params: { lang, tag } });
    }
  }
  return paths;
}

const { lang, tag } = Astro.params;
const posts = (await getCollection('blog', (p) => p.data.lang === lang && !p.data.draft && p.data.tags.includes(tag!)))
  .sort((a, b) => b.data.pubDate.valueOf() - a.data.pubDate.valueOf());
---

<BaseLayout title={`#${tag}`} lang={lang}>
  <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 py-12">
    <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">
      <span class="font-mono text-[var(--color-accent)]">#</span>{tag}
    </h1>
    <p class="text-[var(--color-text-dim)] mb-8">{posts.length} {lang === 'vi' ? 'bài viết' : 'posts'}</p>
    <ul class="space-y-4">
      {posts.map(post => {
        const [, ...slugParts] = post.id.split('/');
        const slug = slugParts.join('/').replace(/\.(md|mdx)$/, '');
        return (
          <li>
            <a href={`/${lang}/blog/${slug}`} class="group block p-4 -mx-4 rounded-lg hover:bg-[var(--color-surface)] transition-colors">
              <h2 class="font-semibold group-hover:text-[var(--color-accent)] transition-colors">{post.data.title}</h2>
              <p class="text-sm text-[var(--color-text-dim)] mt-1">{post.data.description}</p>
            </a>
          </li>
        );
      })}
    </ul>
    <a href={`/${lang}/tags`} class="inline-block mt-6 text-sm text-[var(--color-accent)] hover:underline">
      {lang === 'vi' ? '← Tất cả tags' : '← All tags'}
    </a>
  </div>
</BaseLayout>
```

**Step 7: Verify all routes work**

```bash
npx astro dev --port 4321
```

Test these URLs:
- `http://localhost:4321/` → redirects to `/en/`
- `http://localhost:4321/en/` → home with recent posts
- `http://localhost:4321/en/blog` → post listing
- `http://localhost:4321/en/blog/hello-world` → full post with TOC + Giscus
- `http://localhost:4321/vi/` → Vietnamese home
- `http://localhost:4321/en/tags` → tag cloud
- Theme toggle works on all pages

**Step 8: Commit**

```bash
git add src/pages/
git commit -m "feat: add all route pages — home, blog, post, tags"
```

---

### Task 7: Add RSS Feed

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/rss.xml.ts`

**Step 1: Install RSS package**

```bash
npm install @astrojs/rss
```

**Step 2: Create RSS endpoint**

```typescript
// src/pages/rss.xml.ts
import rss from '@astrojs/rss';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
import type { APIContext } from 'astro';

export async function GET(context: APIContext) {
  const posts = (await getCollection('blog', (p) => !p.data.draft))
    .sort((a, b) => b.data.pubDate.valueOf() - a.data.pubDate.valueOf());

  return rss({
    title: 'tai.bui blog',
    description: 'Learn in public — a full-stack developer blog by Tai Bui',
    site: context.site!,
    items: posts.map(post => {
      const [lang, ...slugParts] = post.id.split('/');
      const slug = slugParts.join('/').replace(/\.(md|mdx)$/, '');
      return {
        title: post.data.title,
        pubDate: post.data.pubDate,
        description: post.data.description,
        link: `/${lang}/blog/${slug}`,
      };
    }),
  });
}
```

**Step 3: Verify RSS**

Visit `http://localhost:4321/rss.xml` — should show valid XML with posts.

**Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add src/pages/rss.xml.ts package.json package-lock.json
git commit -m "feat: add RSS feed"
```

---

### Task 8: GitHub Actions Deploy

**Files:**
- Create: `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`

**Step 1: Create deploy workflow**

```yaml
# .github/workflows/deploy.yml
name: Deploy to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - name: Install, build, and upload
        uses: withastro/action@v5

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
```

**Step 2: Verify build locally**

```bash
npx astro build
```

Expected: Build succeeds, output in `dist/`.

**Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add .github/
git commit -m "feat: add github actions deploy workflow"
```

---

### Task 9: Create GitHub Repo & Push

**Step 1: Create the repository on GitHub**

```bash
gh repo create buianhtai.github.io --public --source=. --push
```

If `gh` is not available:
1. Go to https://github.com/new
2. Create repo named `buianhtai.github.io` (public)
3. Push:

```bash
git remote add origin https://github.com/buianhtai/buianhtai.github.io.git
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main
```

**Step 2: Enable GitHub Pages**

1. Go to repo Settings → Pages
2. Build and deployment → Source: **GitHub Actions**
3. Wait for the deploy workflow to finish

**Step 3: Verify live site**

Visit `https://buianhtai.github.io` — blog should be live.

---

### Task 10: Configure Giscus

**Step 1: Enable Discussions on the repo**

1. Repo Settings → Features → check **Discussions**
2. Create a "Blog Comments" category in Discussions

**Step 2: Get Giscus config**

1. Go to https://giscus.app
2. Enter repo: `buianhtai/buianhtai.github.io`
3. Category: Blog Comments
4. Copy the `data-repo-id` and `data-category-id`

**Step 3: Update Giscus component**

Edit `src/components/Giscus.astro` — fill in the empty `data-repo-id` and `data-category-id` values.

**Step 4: Commit and push**

```bash
git add src/components/Giscus.astro
git commit -m "feat: configure giscus with repo IDs"
git push
```

**Step 5: Verify comments work**

Visit a blog post on the live site. The Giscus comment box should appear at the bottom. Log in with GitHub and leave a test comment.

---

## Post-Launch Checklist

- [ ] Write your first real TIL post
- [ ] Share on Twitter/X and dev.to
- [ ] Set up Google Search Console (submit sitemap.xml)
- [ ] Add Umami analytics when ready
- [ ] Add Pagefind search when you have 10+ posts
